mapper.sql:
descendants AS ( SELECT f.id, f.parent_id, f.is_directory, f.file_size, child_nodes.id AS root_id, child_nodes.space_type AS root_space_type, child_nodes.space_id AS root_space_id FROM sys_file f INNER JOIN child_nodes ON f.parent_id = child_nodes.id AND f.space_type = child_nodes.space_type AND f.space_id = child_nodes.space_id WHERE f.in_recycle_bin = 0 AND f.is_deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT f.id, f.parent_id, f.is_directory, f.file_size, descendants.root_id, descendants.root_space_type, descendants.root_space_id FROM sys_file f INNER JOIN descendants ON f.parent_id = descendants.id AND f.space_type = descendants.root_space_type AND f.space_id = descendants.root_space_id WHERE f.in_recycle_bin = 0 AND f.is_deleted = 0 ), directory_sizes AS ( SELECT root_id, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN is_directory = 0 THEN COALESCE(file_size, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_size FROM descendants GROUP BY root_id ) SELECT
, CASE WHEN child_nodes.is_directory = 1 THEN COALESCE(directory_sizes.total_size, 0) ELSE child_nodes.file_size END AS file_size FROM child_nodes LEFT JOIN directory_sizes ON directory_sizes.root_id = child_nodes.id ORDER BY child_nodes.is_directory DESC, child_nodes.create_time DESC, child_nodes.id DESC

descendants AS ( SELECT f.id, f.parent_id, f.is_directory, f.file_size, target_node.id AS root_id, target_node.space_type AS root_space_type, target_node.space_id AS root_space_id FROM sys_file f INNER JOIN target_node ON f.parent_id = target_node.id AND f.space_type = target_node.space_type AND f.space_id = target_node.space_id WHERE f.in_recycle_bin = 0 AND f.is_deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT f.id, f.parent_id, f.is_directory, f.file_size, descendants.root_id, descendants.root_space_type, descendants.root_space_id FROM sys_file f INNER JOIN descendants ON f.parent_id = descendants.id AND f.space_type = descendants.root_space_type AND f.space_id = descendants.root_space_id WHERE f.in_recycle_bin = 0 AND f.is_deleted = 0 ), directory_sizes AS ( SELECT root_id, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN is_directory = 0 THEN COALESCE(file_size, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_size FROM descendants GROUP BY root_id ) SELECT
, CASE WHEN target_node.is_directory = 1 THEN COALESCE(directory_sizes.total_size, 0) ELSE target_node.file_size END AS file_size FROM target_node LEFT JOIN directory_sizes ON directory_sizes.root_id = target_node.id LIMIT 1
mapper.select: WITH RECURSIVE descendants AS ( SELECT * FROM sys_file WHERE id = #{rootId} AND is_deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT f.* FROM sys_file f INNER JOIN descendants d ON f.parent_id = d.id WHERE f.is_deleted = 0 ) SELECT * FROM descendants WHERE id != #{rootId}
mapper.update: WITH RECURSIVE descendants AS ( SELECT f.id, CONCAT(#{parentFullPath}, ',', f.id) AS new_full_path FROM sys_file f WHERE f.parent_id = #{rootId} AND f.is_deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT f.id, CONCAT(d.new_full_path, ',', f.id) FROM sys_file f INNER JOIN descendants d ON f.parent_id = d.id WHERE f.is_deleted = 0 ) UPDATE sys_file s INNER JOIN descendants d ON s.id = d.id SET s.full_path = d.new_full_path
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_file WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND parent_id = #{parentId} AND is_directory = 1 AND in_recycle_bin = 0 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY original_name ASC
SELECT id, original_name, parent_id FROM sys_file WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_directory = 1 AND in_recycle_bin = 0 AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_file WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_directory = 0 AND in_recycle_bin = 0 AND is_deleted = 0 AND original_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM sys_file WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND in_recycle_bin = 1 AND recycle_root = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY deleted_at DESC, id DESC

SELECT DISTINCT parent_id FROM sys_file WHERE space_type = 'TEAM' AND space_id = #{teamId} AND is_directory = 1 AND in_recycle_bin = 0 AND is_deleted = 0 AND parent_id IN
#{id}
SELECT id, original_name, parent_id FROM sys_file WHERE user_id = #{_parameter} AND space_type = 'PERSONAL' AND space_id = #{_parameter} AND is_directory = 1 AND in_recycle_bin = 0 AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT * FROM sys_file WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND space_type = 'PERSONAL' AND space_id = #{userId} AND is_directory = 0 AND in_recycle_bin = 0 AND is_deleted = 0 AND original_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC

SELECT * FROM sys_file WHERE user_id = #{_parameter} AND space_type = 'PERSONAL' AND space_id = #{_parameter} AND in_recycle_bin = 1 AND recycle_root = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY deleted_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM sys_file WHERE space_type = 'TEAM' AND space_id = #{teamId} AND parent_id = #{parentId} AND is_directory = 1 AND in_recycle_bin = 0 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC

SELECT * FROM sys_file WHERE user_id = #{_parameter} AND space_type = 'PERSONAL' AND space_id = #{_parameter} AND in_recycle_bin = 0 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY parent_id ASC, is_directory DESC, id ASC

SELECT original_name FROM sys_file WHERE space_type = 'TEAM' AND space_id = #{teamId} AND parent_id = #{parentId} AND in_recycle_bin = 0 AND is_deleted = 0
AND original_name LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%')

SELECT * FROM sys_file WHERE space_type = 'TEAM' AND space_id = #{teamId} AND in_recycle_bin = 0 AND is_deleted = 0 AND original_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM sys_file WHERE space_type = 'TEAM' AND space_id = #{_parameter} AND in_recycle_bin = 0 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY parent_id ASC, is_directory DESC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM sys_file WHERE space_type = 'TEAM' AND space_id = #{_parameter} AND in_recycle_bin = 1 AND recycle_root = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY deleted_at DESC, id DESC
mapper.update: WITH RECURSIVE descendants AS ( SELECT f.id FROM sys_file f WHERE f.parent_id = #{rootId} AND f.space_type = #{spaceType} AND f.space_id = #{spaceId} AND f.in_recycle_bin = 0 AND f.is_deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT f.id FROM sys_file f INNER JOIN descendants d ON f.parent_id = d.id WHERE f.space_type = #{spaceType} AND f.space_id = #{spaceId} AND f.in_recycle_bin = 0 AND f.is_deleted = 0 ) UPDATE sys_file s INNER JOIN descendants d ON s.id = d.id SET s.in_recycle_bin = 1, s.recycle_root = 0, s.deleted_at = NOW(), s.expire_at = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL #{retentionSeconds} SECOND)

UPDATE sys_file SET in_recycle_bin = 1, recycle_root = 1, deleted_at = NOW(), expire_at = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL #{retentionSeconds} SECOND), deleted_by = #{deletedBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{rootId} AND space_type = #{spaceType} AND space_id = #{spaceId} AND in_recycle_bin = 0 AND is_deleted = 0

WITH RECURSIVE restored AS ( SELECT f.id, CASE WHEN #{parentFullPath} IS NULL OR #{parentFullPath} = '' THEN CAST(f.id AS CHAR(1000)) ELSE CONCAT(#{parentFullPath}, ',', f.id) END AS new_full_path FROM sys_file f WHERE f.id = #{rootId} AND f.space_type = #{spaceType} AND f.space_id = #{spaceId} AND f.in_recycle_bin = 1 AND f.recycle_root = 1 AND f.is_deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT f.id, CONCAT(r.new_full_path, ',', f.id) FROM sys_file f INNER JOIN restored r ON f.parent_id = r.id WHERE f.space_type = #{spaceType} AND f.space_id = #{spaceId} AND f.in_recycle_bin = 1 AND f.recycle_root = 0 AND f.is_deleted = 0 ) UPDATE sys_file s INNER JOIN restored r ON s.id = r.id SET s.in_recycle_bin = 0, s.recycle_root = 0, s.deleted_at = NULL, s.expire_at = NULL, s.deleted_by = NULL, s.full_path = r.new_full_path, s.parent_id = CASE WHEN s.id = #{rootId} THEN #{parentId} ELSE s.parent_id END, s.original_name = CASE WHEN s.id = #{rootId} THEN #{rootName} ELSE s.original_name END

WITH RECURSIVE deleted_tree AS ( SELECT f.id FROM sys_file f WHERE f.id = #{rootId} AND f.space_type = #{spaceType} AND f.space_id = #{spaceId} AND f.in_recycle_bin = 1 AND f.recycle_root = 1 AND f.is_deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT f.id FROM sys_file f INNER JOIN deleted_tree d ON f.parent_id = d.id WHERE f.space_type = #{spaceType} AND f.space_id = #{spaceId} AND f.in_recycle_bin = 1 AND f.recycle_root = 0 AND f.is_deleted = 0 ) UPDATE sys_file s INNER JOIN deleted_tree d ON s.id = d.id SET s.is_deleted = 1, s.update_time = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_file WHERE space_type = #{spaceType} AND space_id = #{spaceId} AND in_recycle_bin = 1 AND recycle_root = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY deleted_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM sys_file WHERE in_recycle_bin = 1 AND recycle_root = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 AND expire_at IS NOT NULL AND expire_at <= #{now} ORDER BY expire_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT f.* FROM sys_file f INNER JOIN private_space ps ON ps.user_id = f.space_id INNER JOIN user_quota uq ON uq.user_id = ps.user_id WHERE f.space_type = 'PRIVATE' AND f.parent_id = 0 AND f.in_recycle_bin = 0 AND f.is_deleted = 0 AND ps.is_deleted = 0 AND ps.password_hash IS NOT NULL AND ps.password_hash != '' AND ps.grace_expire_at IS NOT NULL AND ps.grace_expire_at <= #{now} AND uq.total_quota != #{vipQuota} ORDER BY ps.grace_expire_at ASC, f.id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_file SET expire_at = DATE_ADD(deleted_at, INTERVAL #{retentionSeconds} SECOND) WHERE in_recycle_bin = 1 AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL AND is_deleted = 0
